records.content: Policy rule for Security operations / incident response controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Current control record does not close the required dependency for external IOC blocking. The required dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, unsigned, unapproved, or scoped elsewhere: current IOC confidence and business-impact review match.
